headline: Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Household products company Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 2.7% year on year to $4.16 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.97 per share was 2.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
